---
title: "R Bites: Mini R Projects"
---

This is a website featuring little R projects that weren't big enough on their own.

*So far*:

<img align='left' style="margin: 0px 12px 0px 0px" src=images/video-player.gif>
A lightweight set of functions to render video in the console at native framerate. [link](video-player/video-player.qmd)

<br clear="left"/>

<img align='left' width=100 height=70 style="margin: 0px 12px 0px 0px" src=images/flipphone.jpeg> Running R on a flip phone, and pushing to github from it. [link](flipphone-r/flipphone-r.qmd)

<br clear="left">

<img align='left' width=100 height=70 style="margin: 0px 12px 0px 0px" src=images/selfie.png>

A video conference client running in R, streaming webcam video to the console. [link](conference/conference.qmd)

<br clear="left">

See my [main website](https://gbkorr.github.io/gbkorr/) for more projects!
